description:
Nitro PDF Pro is an application used to create, edit, sign, and secure PDF files and digital documents.


What's New
- PDF v1.7 Creation: PDF creation tools now produce modern PDF v1.7 documents (ISO 32000-1:2008) instead of legacy v1.4 format, improving compatibility with modern security features and CMS applications.
- Rendering Performance: We made Nitro faster at displaying pages on screen. Improved document display speed by making memory usage more efficient in the rendering engine.
Fixed Issues & Improvements
- Resolved an issue where fonts could render incorrectly when printing certain documents from PDF Pro.
- Fixed display issues with SAP NetWeaver-generated documents where content was missing
- Resolved digital signature validation failures for documents signed with OneSpan and eIDAS QES-listed providers (e.g., ZealiD)
- Fixed blank Dynamic Text dropdown in Headers & Footers management
- Resolved crashes when opening or editing PDFium-generated PDF files
- Fixed redaction mark properties not being preserved when splitting or combining documents marked by third-party applications
- Fixed repair functionality for Nitro installations performed via bootstrap installer (EXE)
- Addressed security vulnerabilities
